'''''Norge''''' was a [[Virella Systems cargo freighter]] that approached [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Station]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="SW:XwA" />

==Characteristics==
The cargo freighter pulled three [[Class-I cargo container]]s, two [[Class-J cargo container]]s, and four [[Class-D cargo container]]s, as well as a rear engine block.<ref name="SW:XwA" />

==History==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], a pivotal battle between [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Dating">The events portrayed in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' take place between the conclusion of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|destruction]] of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]; the family missions, which serve as a prologue and in which Ace Azzameen makes his first transport run, all take place before the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]], also portrayed in ''X-Wing Alliance'', which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in 3.5 ABY, and the Battle of Hoth is known to have taken place on 38:6:6 according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. Therefore, because the prologue missions of ''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'' take place between the Battle of Hoth and the Battle of the Bajic Shipyards, the ''Norge'' visits Azzameen Station some time between these two dates.</ref> the ''Norge'' exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] near [[Azzameen Station/Legends|Azzameen Station]] as [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and [[Aeron Azzameen]] made a delivery to the [[XQ1 Platform]] [[Harlequin Station]] on Ace's first transport run.<ref name="SW:XwA" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Norge" is the Norwegian word for "[[Wikipedia:Norway|Norway]]."

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
